_instructions:
You are helping enrich a Metaphysical Bible Dictionary (MIB) with Strong's concordance numbers.

For each entry in the "entries" array:
- "word" is the biblical word or concept
- "etym" is its original language (Heb. = Hebrew, Gk. = Greek)
- "mibDef" is its literal definition
- "mibMeta" is its metaphysical/spiritual interpretation (may be truncated)
- "candidates" are Strong's numbers suggested by a word-map lookup — these are hints ONLY, not exhaustive

Your task:
1. Using your knowledge of Hebrew and Greek Strong's concordance, identify ALL Strong's numbers
   whose meaning semantically matches the spiritual/metaphysical sense of this word.
2. The candidates list is a starting point — you may confirm some, discard others, and ADD
   additional Strong's numbers not in the candidates list if they genuinely match.
3. Use "etym" to stay in the right language (Heb. → H numbers, Gk. → G numbers) unless
   the concept clearly spans both Testaments.
4. Exclude unrelated homonyms (e.g. H7043 "light/trivial in weight" does NOT match
   "light" as divine illumination).

Return ONLY a valid JSON array — no explanation, no markdown, no code fences:
[
  { "id": <same id from input>, "matches": ["H216", "H215", "G5457"] },
  { "id": <same id from input>, "matches": [] },
  ...
]

Every entry in the input must appear in your output. Empty "matches" is valid if nothing fits.

entries.mibDef: protection from dazzling brightness; sun-protected;
entries.mibMeta: In Zelzah and the persons connected with the incident recorded in I Samuel 10 we find a union of faith and will with the animal and life forces in the organism. Samuel the prophet signifies the inner voice of Spirit, or the inner spiritual understanding expressing itself to the individual. He was of

entries.mibDef: double shearings; second shearing; double fleece; two coats of
entries.mibMeta: Thoughts of substance multiplied and strengthened in consciousness ( double shearings, double fleece, two coats of wool, double purning). Pruning and shearing give the idea of cutting off; even so thoughts of lack must be put away, that thoughts of substance may be established. The Zemaraim that was

entries.mibDef: that which exceeds the limits of moral authority; hunger for
entries.mibMeta: Rebellious, tyrannical, despotic thoughts and desires belonging to the "mind of the flesh" phase of consciousness in unredeemed man; the outer man seeking the dominion that belongs alone to the inner, or spiritual, man. (See HAM and CANAAN.)

entries.mibDef: striking the harp; music; song; chant; hymn of
entries.mibMeta: Harmonious expression in joy, praise, and triumph over error (striking the harp, music, hymn of praise, song of triumph). This comes about by means of an active faith (Benjamin).

entries.mibDef: rich in flocks; place of the flocks.
entries.mibMeta: Abundant substance and vitality (rich in flocks, place of flocks; see ZAANAN).

entries.mibDef: Zeus-given; gift of Jove; living.
entries.mibMeta: The belief that the understanding and the power of life come from some material source (Zeus-given, gift of Jove, living). Zeus and Jove are names of Jupiter, who was worshiped as the supreme god by the ancient Greeks, ly Jupiter represents the great value that the spiritually unawakened man puts on

entries.mibDef: Jehovah has hidden; protected of Jehovah; Jah is secret; secret
entries.mibMeta: Truth active in the consciousness of the individual but hidden from the outer, sense phase of his being (Jehovah has hidden, Jah is secret, secret place of Jehovah). entries.mibDef: looking about; viewing from a distance; bending forward to behold;

entries.mibDef: place of the watchtower; high watch; beholding; awaiting;
entries.mibMeta: Spiritual watch being kept in the lower or more subconscious phase of thought in the individual (place of the watchtower, high watch, a valley in the lowlands of Judah; see MARESHAH and ZERAH). entries.mibDef: outlook; watcher; watchtower; high watch; awaiting; expectation;
entries.mibMeta: A watchful, seeing, expectant thought, or attitude of mind, with an upward tendency, that belongs seemingly to the outer or physical man (outlook, watchtower, high watch, attention, expectation, obsen’ation, son of Eliphaz, and grandson of Esau; see ELIPHAZ and ESAU).

entries.mibDef: watchman; observer; attender; waiter; expecter; keeper of the high
entries.mibMeta: A realization of power (Gad, a son of Jacob, represents the power faculty in man), which is the result of a desire for, and a seeking after, power (watchman, observer, expecter, keeper of the high watch; the latter definition suggests prayer, an earnest desire for and expectation of something higher

entries.mibDef: strait; narrow; pent up; compressed; cleavage; fissure; straits; distress;
entries.mibMeta: A group of thoughts of a very strong, established character ( rock, a fortified city of Naphtali, Naphtali representing the strength faculty in individual consciousness). This consciousness of great strength lacks the spiritual quality as yet. It is narrow, hard, and unyielding (flint), and has not

entries.mibMeta: The individual awakening to the ZERERAH conscious recognition of his own indwelling Christ or I AM understanding and might (Jehovah has arisen, Jah shines forth with glory, Jah is appearing, brilliance of Jehovah, birth of Jehovah), and expressing this light and power constructively. entries.mibDef: gold.
entries.mibMeta: A degree of soul wisdom (gold, a woman) that is of the carnal, adverse phase of consciousness in man.

entries.mibDef: appearing; coming into manifestation; light; brilliance; brightness;
entries.mibMeta: The bright shining of spiritual understanding into and through the consciousness of the spiritually awakening individual (light, oil, splendor, brightness); this is the result of the freeing activity of prayer and praise (Judah). This name also bespeaks the manifestation of Truth in the outer life a

entries.mibDef: breaking forth of light; brilliance
entries.mibMeta: The wonderful illumination and glory, the spiritual uplift, the ecstasy, that so often accompany the inflow of new spiritual understanding, or light, into the consciousness of man after a period of trial or seeming darkness. (Zereth-shahar means breaking forth of ZERUBBABEL light, aurora's splendor,

entries.mibDef: running; flowing; distilling; mastic; balsam; balm.
entries.mibMeta: The very essence of Spirit entering into the consciousness and organism of man as a harmonizing, healing, renewing energy and power (running, flowing, distilling, mastic, balsam, balm, an Israelitish musician in David's reign). (See IZRI.)

entries.mibDef: pressing, compressing ; binding ; oppressing ; tied; a bundle; a packet;
entries.mibMeta: Concentrated thought, bringing one's thoughts together, and centering the attention on one central idea ( bundle , particle, tied, binding, compressing, bag, pebble, grain, kernel).

entries.mibDef: heavily smitten; stricken; prostrated; scourged; leprous; hornets;
entries.mibMeta: A phase of the soul consciousness in man that is unclean and impure in thought and desire (leprous); also the troublous, fearful, stinging, error experiences that are the result of this condition of the soul ( heavily smitten, stricken, hornets, terror).

entries.mibDef: sown in Babylon; conceived
entries.mibMeta: A very strong and influential thought activity belonging to the spiritual phase of man. entries.mibDef: cleft; wounded; flowing; running; distilling; balsam; balm.
entries.mibMeta: Zeruiah and Abigail, sisters of David and daughters of Jesse, signify two attitudes of the soul in the spiritually awakening individual who is in the overcoming phase of his development. Abigail bespeaks the great joy and gladness that one feels because of the entrance of new light and Truth into co

entries.mibDef: luminous essence; giving light; shining; brightness; oil; oil tree; olive
entries.mibMeta: A thought belonging to the love faculty in the individual (a man of the tribe of Levi) that radiates the spirit of peace and prosperity (luminous essence, giving light, oil, shining, olive ZIBA tree, olive, olives being representative of peace and of great abundance, while oil symbolizes the Holy Sp

entries.mibDef: giving light; shining; brightness; olive; olive tree.
entries.mibMeta: A thought in the active faith faculty of the individual (a man of Benjamin) that is radiating the spirit of peace and bounty (shining, olive, olive tree; see ZETHAM for the significance of olives).

entries.mibDef: splendor; brilliance- star; conqueror.
entries.mibMeta: A purely mental perception and amplification of conquest and dominion (splendor, brilliance, star, conqueror) that helps to sustain the puffed-up personal will (a chamberlain who ministered to King Ahasuerus of Media and Persia).

entries.mibDef: motion; movement; agitation; commotion; disquiet; trembling; shaking;
entries.mibMeta: A step in the unfolding of dominion and power in the individual consciousness, wherein fearfulness and instability seemingly prevail (motion, movement, disquiet, trembling, fear, a man of the Israelitish tribe of Gad, Gad referring to the power faculty). We find in Peter (faith), at a certain stage

entries.mibDef: placed; stationed; left standing; statue; plantation; fixed;
entries.mibMeta: After Saul's household was destroyed, only Ziba, a servant, and Mephibosheth, a grandson who was crippled, were left. Ziba means a statue. entries.mibDef: immersed; dipped in; dyed; tinged; variegated; ravenous preyer; wild
entries.mibMeta: Hivites represent thoughts of opposition and resistance in the carnal phase of consciousness in unredeemed man. entries.mibDef: beauty; gracefulness; antelope; gazelle; roe; deer.
entries.mibMeta: A swift, graceful, harmonious thought activity in the faith faculty in consciousness (beauty, gracefulness, gazelle, roe, deer; a man of Benjamin), also ZIHA in the spiritual phase of the soul (a woman of Beersheba, and mother of Jehoash, king of Judah). Zibiah. (See ZIBIA, b.)

entries.mibDef: called to mind; remembered; memorial; remembrance; recollected;
entries.mibMeta: Thoughts in man's higher, religious and spiritual consciousness (Israelites, some of them men of note) that keep calling his attention to the outworking of the law of Being, and to the importance of taking cognizance of this law ( called to mind, remembered, recollected, remembrance, renowned ).

entries.mibMeta: An inner sense of harmony; also an inner lauding and praising, thus a lifting up, of the activity-of-life idea in individual consciousness (celebrated in song, singing, dancing, music, mountain sheep, gazelle). entries.mibMeta: The inferiority of material thought and belief, in the light of the higher, truer understanding of Spirit (reduced, brought low, littleness, smallness, contemned, dishonored, a city in the hill country of Judah). entries.mibDef: flux; fluidity; liquid; flowing; pure; refined; clean.
entries.mibMeta: The significance of Ziphah is the same as that of Ziph, a cleansing, purifying, refining thought in action in the consciousness. In Ziphah we also see established the effect of this thought in cleanliness and purity of thought (flux, flowing, clean, pure, refined).

entries.mibDef: little bird; sparrow; chirper; twitterer.
entries.mibMeta: Zipporah is the feminine of Zippor, and one definition of both names is little bird. In our study of the involution of the soul we learn that birds signify, or should signify, free, swift thoughts, thoughts that unite heaven and earth. entries.mibMeta: Humility (made little, smallness). Nethanel, son of Zuar, signifies the grace that God imparts to His children. entries.mibMeta: The significance is the same as that of Zophai, the sweetness and orderliness of Truth. (See ZOPHAI.)

entries.mibDef: rock; stone; acute; sharp; precipitous; refuge; shelter; protection; founder of a
entries.mibMeta: Faith, as referring to the man of Benjamin (rock, refuge), and a very hard, aggressive, besieging, warring thought activity, as it pertains to the prince of Midian (rock, stone, precipitous, beset, assailed, besieged).

entries.mibDef: God is my rock; whose protection is God; God is my defense; God is a
entries.mibMeta: A realization of God, the indwelling Spirit of truth, as one's firm, unwavering faith, as one's steadfastness and defense (God is my rock, God is a refuge, strength of God; a Levite).

entries.mibDef: the Almighty is a rock; my rock is the Almighty; the
entries.mibMeta: Like Zuriel, the knowledge or realization of God as unchanging principle, as one's staying power, defense, the ZUZIM 706 sure foundation of one's abiding perfection and good ( the Almighty is a rock, my rock is the Almighty).
